title: missing convention: field-selector guard required in put() for field-capable backends
description: aws-sm and azure-kv both had the same bug (put() ignoring field selector, silently corrupting secrets). The fix pattern is identical: check self.field.is_some() at the start of put() and return InvalidUri. No convention in CLAUDE.md captures this rule. A new field-capable backend (or vault contributor) will repeat the mistake. Add to CLAUDE.md Conventions & Patterns.
